Escape to Romance in Blue Ridge: Discover the Charm of Cabin Rentals of Georgia's Romantic Retreats

Nestled in the wintry serene beauty of Blue Ridge, GA, Cabin Rentals of Georgia invites you to a world where nature meets luxury - a perfect setting for romantic getaways. Whether you're celebrating an anniversary, planning a special proposal, or simply seeking a tranquil escape with your significant other, our selection of romantic cabins offers an idyllic backdrop.

Creekside Green - A Cozy Nest Amidst Nature

Imagine waking up to a gentle babbling creek and the sweet melody of birds. Creekside Green (2 bedroom/2 bath), one of our most sought-after romantic cabins, is a haven of peace and privacy. Its rustic charm, combined with modern amenities, creates a warm and inviting atmosphere. The cabin features a paved patio with a large fire pit right at the river's edge, offering peaceful views of the surrounding creek, flora and fauna - ideal for a relaxing evening under the stars. 

Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek - Romance Under the Stars

For couples who dream of a night sky illuminated by countless stars, Cherokee Sunrise is the perfect choice. This cabin not only sits on 30 acres of pristine privacy, but provides a cozy interior with a Restoration Hardware renovation. Enjoy evenings cuddled up in blankets before a blazing outdoor fire pit, perfect for toasting marshmallows or sipping wine by the fire. The highlight, however, is its prime location for stargazing, making every night a celestial spectacle.

Cohutta Sunset - Lovers Retreat Amidst the Mountains

Imagine a cozy romantic cabin, secluded in the tranquility of a mountainous landscape. This rustically elegant cabin exudes a cozy ambiance, thanks to its rich wooden interiors and a crackling fireplace. Perhaps the most enchanting feature is the outdoor hot tub in front of a cozy fireplace on the private deck overlooking the Cohutta Mountain Range. It's an idyllic spot for unwinding under the stars, enveloped by the quiet of the mountains, making for unforgettable moments.

Aska Escape Lodge - Romantic Mountain Escape

This romantic cabin is a picture-perfect embodiment of rustic charm blended with modern comforts, ideal for a romantic getaway. The front porch, adorned with comfortable conversational seating, invites you to sit in front of a wood-burning fireplace, perhaps with a steaming cup of coffee in hand as the morning mist dances through the pines. For those who love the outdoors, the cabin's location is a gateway to adventure - hiking trails, scenic drives, yet close to Downtown Blue Ridge are just a short jaunt away. Yet, the cabin itself remains a secluded sanctuary, where time slows down, and the focus is solely on relaxation and rejuvenation in the company of your loved one.

Amenities for a Perfect Romantic Stay

At Cabin Rentals of Georgia, we understand the essence of a romantic getaway. Most of our cabins are equipped with luxurious amenities such as king-size beds, jacuzzis, gourmet kitchens, and outdoor grills. Each cabin is uniquely designed to ensure privacy and comfort, making your stay memorable. But the key ingredients for an ideal romantic cabin are:

  • Cozy Fireplaces
  • Outdoor Fire Pits
  • Hot Tub
  • Luxurious Beds
  • Beautiful Views

Explore Blue Ridge Together

Beyond the cabin, Blue Ridge awaits with its charming downtown, scenic train rides, vineyards, and hiking trails. Enjoy a day exploring local artisan shops, dining at quaint eateries, or experiencing outdoor adventures together. Some must-experience activities include:

  • Downtown Blue Ridge Shopping
  • Visit Roo Winery in Ellijay - incredible mountain views and ambience with large stone fireplace
  • Hike Fall Branch Falls Waterfall Hike close to town
  • Helicopter Ride over North GA Mountains
  • Sip uniquely crafted coffee in cushy cozy furnishings at Mountain Mama's in town

Book Your Romantic Getaway Now

Ready to indulge in romance? Check our Availability Calendar to explore our full range of romantic cabins and reserve your special retreat ~ or call us at 706-432-2140. Blue Ridge's enchanting landscape and our cozy cabins are waiting to play host to your romantic story.
title: Best Romantic Cabins in Blue Ridge
